name: Chocolate Crunch Pie
recipeInstructions:
Rocks: Any combination of chocolate chips, peanut butter chips, chopped peanuts or pecans, granola bar chunks, butterfinger candy bars, crushed.
Prepare pudding mix with 1 cup milk as directed on package. Fold in Cool Whip. Stir in 1 cup finely crushed Oreos and the "rocks" into pudding mixture. Spoon into pie crust. Sprinkle with remaining cookies. Freeze until firm, 4 hours or overnight. Let stand at room temperature for 10 minutes before serving. Store any leftover pie in freezer.
